headline: Is Dollar General open on Easter?
summary: If you feel like Easter gets a little more expensive every year, you aren’t alone. New data from the National Retail Federation shows that consumer spending on Easter is expected to hit a record high of $24.9 billion this year. Food is one of the largest contributors to that ballooning budget, ...
